title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at KTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at KTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
